original-actions: Tracks a Pictish robber through the forest for several hours
Slays the Pict before he can ambush the settler Balthus
Identifies the headless corpse as merchant Tiberias, a victim of Zogar Sag's curse
Constructs a crude litter to carry the merchant's body toward Fort Tuscelan
Hurls his axe at a glowing supernatural figure attempting to steal Tiberias's head
Reports to Governor Valannus about the sorcerer threat and rising Pict aggression
Proposes a covert strategy of twelve men rather than a large, noisy battalion
Hand-picks ten soldiers to accompany him on a secret assassination mission
Leads a canoe expedition down the Black River toward Zogar Sag's village
Slips ashore with nine men while Balthus and one soldier guard the boat
Rescues Balthus by thrusting a spear through a giant serpent's neck during Zogar Sag's attack
Sets fire to village huts to create confusion during their escape
Flees deeper into the Pictish forest rather than retreating toward the river
Kills a leopard tracking them through the forest
Scratches a protective symbol on the ground to repel Zogar Sag's enchanted beasts
Mimics the Pict language to lure a Pict rower to shore
Kills the Pict rower with an arrow and steals his canoe
Crosses the Black River back to Aquilonian territory with Balthus
Reunites with Slasher, a feral dog he had previously rescued
Deduces an imminent Pictish attack on Fort Tuscelan and races northward
Splits from Balthus to warn salt-gathering fishermen while Balthus warns the settlers
Encounters a swamp devil on the road, revealed to be Zogar Sag's half-brother
Beheads the demon with a powerful swing, killing Zogar Sag through their mystical link
Leads warned settlers to safety in Velitrium
Vows to avenge Balthus's death with the heads of more Picts
generalized-actions: Tracks enemy scout through wilderness for hours
Slays enemy before he can ambush inexperienced companion
Identifies mutilated corpse as victim of enemy sorcerer's curse
Constructs crude litter to carry corpse toward frontier fort
Hurls weapon at supernatural entity attempting to desecrate corpse
Reports enemy sorcerer threat and rising tribal aggression to commander
Proposes small covert strike force over large conspicuous battalion
Hand-picks elite soldiers for secret assassination mission
Leads river expedition toward enemy sorcerer's stronghold
Slips ashore with strike team while companion guards escape route
Rescues companion by slaying giant serpent summoned by enemy sorcerer
Sets fire to enemy village to cover escape
Flees deeper into enemy territory rather than obvious retreat path
Kills predator beast tracking the party through wilderness
Uses protective ward to repel sorcerer's enchanted beasts
Mimics enemy language to lure lone enemy into ambush
Kills enemy with arrow and steals his boat
Crosses border river back to friendly territory with companion
Reunites with feral animal he had previously rescued
Deduces imminent enemy attack on frontier fort and races to warn
Splits from companion to cover more ground warning civilians
Encounters demonic entity linked to enemy sorcerer
Slays demon, killing distant sorcerer through mystical link
Leads warned civilians to safety in fortified settlement
Vows vengeance for fallen companion's death
